title: UNICO - Swap header logo to new generated asset

requirements.summary: Replace the header logo to consistently use the new UNICO logo asset site-wide and remove any remaining references to the old uploaded logo.
acceptanceCriteria: The header logo image source points to /assets/generated/unico-logo-new.dim_512x512.png (or the equivalent static asset path used by the project).
No UI location continues to reference or render the first uploaded logo file (WhatsApp Image 2026-02-17 at 10.19.06 AM-2.jpeg).
The logo renders correctly on both mobile and desktop without layout breakage (maintains appropriate sizing/contain behavior).

file_operations.description: Add the new logo static asset at the canonical generated-assets path so that /assets/generated/unico-logo-new.dim_512x512.png resolves correctly in all environments.

Update the header/primary logo to reference /assets/generated/unico-logo-new.dim_512x512.png and ensure no remaining references to the old file (WhatsApp Image 2026-02-17 at 10.19.06 AM-2.jpeg) remain anywhere in this header markup; keep responsive sizing behavior (object-contain, stable width/height) to avoid layout breakage on mobile and desktop.
